case_title: YONG ZHANG ET AL VS. CAROLYN LIU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2024 BY JOSEPH HURLEY.
